---
title: "Edmund Sydney Williams"
---

## Edmund Sydney Williams

**Dates:** (1817-1891)

### Description

partner in Williams and Norgate, publishers specializing in foreign books

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 12th 1867
- Letter from Oct 26 1866
- Letter from Decr 6th 1865
- Letter from June 5th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
